html:
Exclusive to:

A Bookcase is a Structure added in Don't Starve Together and only craftable by Wickerbottom in her Survivor Items Filter. It requires one Feather Pencil, two Living Logs and four Papyrus to build. It allows to prototype most of her unique Books (with the exception of Sleepytime Stories and The End is Nigh!). It has twenty slots for storing her Books as well as the Cookbook and Papyrus.

It restores the durability of her books inside it at a rate of 1 % per 30 seconds. The restoration rate is double while a Wickerbottom is within a three turf cell radius of a Bookcase. The additional restoration rate does not stack with more than one Wickerbottom in range.

In addition, the Bookcase is a science station that unlocks Alchemy Engine level recipes for all characters.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Proof of Purchase Bookhouse skin is obtained by purchasing the Wickerbottom Youtooz.
Proof of Purchase
Bookhouse
Plenty of rooms for your books.

Trivia

  • The Dewey Decimal System referenced in the item description is a system of library organization
  • During the beta testing of the Wickerbottom Character Update, it was possible to put Codex Umbra in a bookcase despite the fact that when looking at the Codex Umbra, Wickerbottom says: "I'm not letting THAT in MY library!". This feature was later removed in beta update 516063.

Assets

  • Bookhouse

Gallery

  • Old Bookcase Station Icon
  • Bookcase slots
  • Bookcase burned
  • Bookcase concept art for Wickerbottom Rework from Rhymes With Play August 4, 2022.
  • Bookcase concept art for Wickerbottom Rework from Rhymes With Play August 4, 2022.
  • Bookcase concept art for Wickerbottom Rework from Rhymes With Play August 4, 2022.

Exclusive to:
Bookcase
"All books must be arranged using the Dewey Decimal System."
Object Info
Perk
Unlock additional book crafting recipes, can hold up to 20 Books or stacks of Papyrus, regenerates books inside it over time.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×2 ×4 ×1 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"bookstation"
“Why study when I can experiment?”
–Wilson, examining a bookcase.
“Hey, uh... what library did Ms. Wickerbottom work at, anyway?”
–Willow, examining a bookcase.
“Makes brainlady happy, Wolfgang will protect it!”
–Wolfgang, examining a bookcase.
“How I miss my poetry books.”
–Wendy, examining a bookcase.
“AN ARCHAIC DATA REPOSITORY”
–WX-78, examining a bookcase.
“Eager minds should always have access to a library.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a bookcase.
“Nice bit of woodworking there.”
–Woodie, examining a bookcase.
“Rebuilding her library, is she?”
–Maxwell, examining a bookcase.
“A tröve öf wisdöm.”
–Wigfrid, examining a bookcase.
“We helped make the doily!”
–Webber, examining a bookcase.
“Mme. Wickerbottom looks so happy organizing her books.”
–Warly, examining a bookcase.
“Book house”
–Wormwood, examining a bookcase.
“I've gotta say, that's some pretty solid construction.”
–Winona, examining a bookcase.
“Her entire collection for our inspection.”
–Wortox, examining a bookcase.
“Glurgh. Why put books up so high?!”
–Wurt, examining a bookcase.
“If you read the books out loud it's almost like listening to a radio play.”
–Walter, examining a bookcase.
“As if I have time to sit and read!”
–Wanda, examining a bookcase.
A Bookcase is a Structure added in Don't Starve Together and only craftable by Wickerbottom in her Survivor Items Filter. It requires one Feather Pencil, two Living Logs and four Papyrus to build. It allows to prototype most of her unique Books (with the exception of Sleepytime Stories and The End is Nigh!). It has twenty slots for storing her Books as well as the Cookbook and Papyrus.
It restores the durability of her books inside it at a rate of 1 % per 30 seconds. The restoration rate is double while a Wickerbottom is within a three turf cell radius of a Bookcase. The additional restoration rate does not stack with more than one Wickerbottom in range.
In addition, the Bookcase is a science station that unlocks Alchemy Engine level recipes for all characters.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tủ Sách là một Cấu Trúc được thêm vào trong Don't Starve Together và chỉ có thể chế tạo bởi Wickerbottom trong Bộ Lọc Vật Phẩm Sống Sót của cô ấy. Nó cần một Bút Chì Lông Vũ, hai Gỗ Sống và bốn Giấy Cói để xây dựng. Nó cho phép tạo nguyên mẫu hầu hết các Sách độc đáo của cô ấy (ngoại trừ Truyện về thời gian ngủ và Kết thúc đã đến! ). Nó có 20 khe để đựng Sách cũng như Sách dạy nấu ăn và Giấy cói.
